data.body: GATES: 754(S2) + 756(46f8) fully GREEN (Verified+1, LLM-Review+1). 753/755/757 failing on the known enrich-prune-race flake -> auto-rechecking poller b7s430oqh running (cooldown 8 polls, cap 6/change) until all 5 green. Base 43d154523 DOES contain the enrich-prune fix 9938a8aab, but the race is still intermittently flaky (active debug/enrich-prune-race worktree) - pre-existing, not my change. PLAN once all green: close 073d->6642->064f->46f8->5b01 bottom-up (completion-verifier each), close epic 81e2 (will be unsigned: 955c force-closed = certifiable:false soft path), then Gerrit Submit 757 to land the stack atomically.
